examples.title: Find maximum in an int array
examples.description: Iterate through an array to compute the maximum element; demonstrates indexed traversal and handling empty arrays.
examples.pseudocode:
if array length is 0 then
  return error or sentinel
set max to array[0]
for i from 1 to array.length - 1 do
  if array[i] > max then
    max <- array[i]
return max

examples.title: Filter positives from an array into an ArrayList
examples.description: Convert a primitive array to an ArrayList by selecting only positive numbers; demonstrates iteration, autoboxing, and dynamic growth.
examples.pseudocode:
create empty list L
for each value v in input array A do
  if v > 0 then
    append v to L
return L

examples.title: Transpose a square matrix (2D array)
examples.description: Swap elements across the diagonal in-place; demonstrates nested loops and 2D indexing.
examples.pseudocode:
let n be number of rows (and columns)
for i from 0 to n - 1 do
  for j from i + 1 to n - 1 do
    swap matrix[i][j] and matrix[j][i]
